docs.title: Gear Up. Get Out. Go Play.
docs.text: Loomi Trading Company is a modern retail and software company built around the sports and lifestyles we love. We curate premium products for golf, snow sports, and everyday life — and we build the tools that make your time on the course even better.

docs.title: Golf
docs.text: From drivers to divot tools, we carry a carefully selected lineup of golf equipment, apparel, and accessories from the brands that matter. Whether you're breaking 80 or breaking in your first set of irons, we have what you need to play your best.

docs.title: Snow Sports
docs.text: When the greens are covered in white, we don't slow down. Our snow sports collection spans skiing and snowboarding gear, outerwear, and accessories built for the mountain.

docs.title: Lifestyle
docs.text: Golf polos that work at brunch. Base layers that double as everyday wear. Our lifestyle collection bridges the gap between sport and street with versatile pieces you'll reach for on and off the course.

docs.title: Golfiasta — GPS Golf Companion
docs.text:
Golfiasta is our flagship golf utility app for iOS. It puts real course data in your pocket with no subscription required.

What it does:

  • Find any course — Search thousands of US golf courses by name or browse nearby. Full offline database means no cell signal needed on the course.
  • Satellite hole maps — View every hole from above with fairways, greens, tees, and bunkers rendered on a satellite map.
  • Live GPS distances — Get accurate front, center, and back distances to the green updated in real time as you move.
  • Shot planning — Tap the map to drop a waypoint and see distances for your next shot. Plan layups, carries, and approaches visually.
  • Hole-by-hole navigation — Step through all 18 holes with camera angles aligned tee-to-green. See the hole the way you'll play it.

Golfiasta is built on open data from OpenStreetMap and uses zero external dependencies — just Apple's own frameworks for a fast, private, native experience.

Download on the App Store

docs.title: Our Approach
docs.text: We keep things simple. No bloated catalogs. No subscription traps. No unnecessary complexity. Every product we sell and every app we build reflects the same philosophy: give people quality gear and useful tools, then get out of the way so they can go play.

docs.title: App Name (30 chars max)
docs.text: Golfiasta

docs.title: Subtitle (30 chars max)
docs.text: Golf GPS, Scorecard & Map

docs.title: Description (4000 chars max)
docs.text:
Find any golf course, get live GPS distances, and track your scores — all on your phone. If you know how to use Apple Maps, you already know how to use Golfiasta. No tutorials, no sign-up screens, no learning curve. Just search, tap Play, and go. Satellite views of every hole, shot planning tools, front/center/back yardage to the green, and a built-in scorecard — no subscription required.

FIND COURSES INSTANTLY Search by name or tap the location button to discover courses near you. Golfiasta includes a bundled database of thousands of US courses so course data loads instantly without waiting for a server, and can find international courses online via OpenStreetMap.

PLAY MODE WITH LIVE GPS Select a course and tap Play — that's it. Every hole is overlaid on a satellite map with tee boxes, fairways, greens, and bunkers clearly marked. Swipe through holes with the picker at the bottom. Pinch, pan, and rotate the map just like you would in any maps app.

GPS DISTANCES TO THE GREEN See live yardage to the front, center, and back of the green, updated continuously as you move. Distances are calculated from actual green polygon geometry when available, giving you accurate reads — not just pin distance.

SHOT PLANNING Tap anywhere on the map to place a waypoint. Golfiasta instantly shows the distance from your position to the waypoint and from the waypoint to the pin, so you can plan layups, dogleg plays, or carry distances before you swing.

HOLE-BY-HOLE NAVIGATION Each hole view automatically aligns the camera to the tee-to-green bearing with a 45-degree tilt, so you see the hole from the perspective you'd see it from the tee. Swipe through holes or tap "All" to see the full course layout. Auto-advance automatically moves you to the next hole when you finish putting and walk toward the next tee — no tapping required. Toggle it on or off anytime.

DETAILED COURSE FEATURES Fairways, greens, tee boxes, and bunkers are rendered as color-coded overlays directly on the satellite map. Features are filtered per hole to keep the display clean and fast.

SCORECARD & SCORE TRACKING Keep score as you play with a beautifully designed scorecard. Tap any hole to enter your score with a simple +/- stepper anchored to par. Birdies get circles, bogeys get squares — just like a real paper scorecard. Your scores are saved automatically when you finish your round.

ROUND HISTORY Review all your past rounds with scores, par comparisons, and course details. Tap any saved round to see the full hole-by-hole breakdown, or hit Play Again to jump straight back into play mode on that course. Swipe to delete rounds you no longer need. Your round history syncs across your Apple devices via iCloud.

NO SUBSCRIPTION. NO ADS. Golfiasta is a one-time purchase. No monthly fees, no ads, no account required. Your data stays on your device and syncs securely via iCloud.

BUILT WITH OPENSTREETMAP DATA Course layouts are derived from OpenStreetMap (openstreetmap.org), available under the Open Database License (ODbL). Map data is contributed by a worldwide community of volunteer mappers. For license details, visit opendatacommons.org/licenses/odbl. GPS distances are approximate and should not be used as a substitute for official course markers or rangefinders.

docs.title: Disclaimer
docs.text: GPS distances provided by Golfiasta are approximate and intended for informational purposes only. They should not be used as a substitute for official course markers, rangefinders, or other distance-measuring devices. Golfiasta is not responsible for any decisions made or actions taken based on the information displayed in the app. Always be aware of your surroundings on the course.

docs.title: Screenshot Guidance
docs.text:
App Store requires screenshots for at least 6.7" (iPhone 15 Pro Max / 16 Pro Max) and 6.1" displays.

Recommended screenshots (in order): 1. Hole detail with GPS — Single hole view showing fairway/green/bunker features, the distance HUD (front/center/back), and the yardage line 2. Scorecard — The skeuomorphic scorecard overlay with scores entered for several holes, showing birdie/bogey decorations 3. Shot planning — Hole view with a waypoint placed, showing both distance segments with yardage labels 4. Course search results — Map showing multiple course boundaries with the course picker visible at the bottom 5. Round history — The round history list showing saved rounds with scores and relative-to-par 6. Search by name — The search bar with text entered and results shown

Capture these on a real device or simulator at the correct resolution. No bezels or added text required — Apple displays them in device frames automatically.

docs.title: Golfiasta — Privacy Policy
docs.text: Effective Date: February 28, 2026

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Golfiasta ("the App") is a golf course finder and GPS distance app developed by Loomi Trading Company LLC. Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how the App handles your data.

docs.title: Data We Collect
docs.text: No personal data. Golfiasta does not collect, store, or transmit any personal information. Golf score history is synced via your iCloud account for cross-device access but contains no personally identifiable information.

docs.title: Location Data
docs.text:
The App uses your device's GPS location solely to calculate distances on the golf course in real time. Location data is processed entirely on your device and is never sent to any server, stored, or shared with any third party.

Location access is only active while the App is in use and only when you enter play mode. You can revoke location permission at any time through your device's Settings.

docs.title: Third-Party Services
docs.text: Golfiasta does not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services. There are no third-party SDKs embedded in the App.

docs.title: Network Requests
docs.text: The App may make requests to the OpenStreetMap Overpass API to retrieve golf course map data when searching for courses not available in the offline database. These requests contain only geographic coordinates and search terms — no personal or device-identifying information is included.

docs.title: Data Storage
docs.text: Course data used by the App is stored locally on your device in a bundled database. Your score history is stored on your device and synced across your Apple devices via iCloud Key-Value Storage, which is tied to your Apple ID. This data contains only golf scores, course names, and course coordinates — no personal information. You can disable iCloud sync for the App in your device's iCloud settings. The App does not use any external databases or remote storage beyond Apple's iCloud service.

docs.title: Children's Privacy
docs.text: Golfiasta does not collect any data from any user, including children under the age of 13.

docs.title: Changes to This Policy
docs.text: If we update this privacy policy, the revised version will be posted here with an updated effective date.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text:
If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:
